prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is E-303 Terminations & splices within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.3 Wire & Cable. The observed field condition is: backstabbed device on 20A circuit (TRD: legal but journeymen won't). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 110.14.
title: T3 E-303 Code/spec compliance
